description: Signaling record indicating this account participates in the fund.at funding ecosystem. Its existence is the signal — all fields are optional enrichment.

main.description: The account's fund.at declaration. Create to join the ecosystem, delete to leave. A backfill service can enumerate all participants by scanning for this record.

entityType.description: What kind of entity this account represents.

role.description: The account's role relative to the projects it stewards.

createdAt.description: When this declaration was created or last updated.
